subcodes.first_line: Human life in this fleeting world dependeth upon the commingling and association of diverse elements [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حيات انسانی در اين جهان فانی منوط به امتزاج و ارتباط عناصر مختلفه است
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @life and death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
